summary: Cross-zone record mirror (custom store tables + sync-records) powering the transcendence commands.
reason: Records are hierarchical (/dns/managed/{domainId}/records) so framework sync skips them and the generated records table has no zone column. Added zone_records + record_snapshots tables, live-fetch helpers, and a sync-records command so where-used/drift/health/export work across all zones offline.
validated_outcome: Live: sync-records mirrored 41 zones/366 records; where-used found 53 cross-zone matches; export produced valid BIND; behavioral unit tests pass.
